mapper.select: SELECT * FROM paper ORDER BY paper_id DESC
SELECT * FROM paper WHERE is_published = TRUE ORDER BY paper_id DESC

SELECT p.*, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.question_type = 'SINGLE' THEN 1 END) AS single_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.question_type = 'MULTIPLE' THEN 1 END) AS multiple_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.question_type = 'JUDGE' THEN 1 END) AS judge_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.question_type = 'BLANK' THEN 1 END) AS blank_count FROM paper p LEFT JOIN paper_question pq ON p.paper_id = pq.paper_id LEFT JOIN question q ON pq.question_id = q.question_id WHERE p.is_published = TRUE GROUP BY p.paper_id ORDER BY p.paper_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paper (paper_name, subject, total_score, duration, pass_score, description, creator_id) VALUES (#{paperName}, #{subject}, #{totalScore}, #{duration}, #{passScore}, #{description}, #{creatorId})
INSERT INTO paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_order) VALUES (#{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{order})

INSERT INTO paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_order) VALUES
(#{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{order})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM paper p INNER JOIN paper_question pq ON p.paper_id = pq.paper_id WHERE pq.question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE paper SET paper_name = #{paperName}, subject = #{subject}, total_score = #{totalScore}, duration = #{duration}, pass_score = #{passScore}, description = #{description} WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, COUNT(pq.question_id) AS single_count, 0 AS multiple_count, 0 AS judge_count, 0 AS blank_count FROM paper p LEFT JOIN paper_question pq ON p.paper_id = pq.paper_id GROUP BY p.paper_id ORDER BY p.paper_id DESC
